originalTitle: Wall Street closes higher as Broadcom rallies
summary: STORY: U.S. stocks ended higher on Monday, with the Dow adding nearly three-tenths of a percent, the S&P 500 rising more than seven-tenths of a percent and the Nasdaq climbing over 1.2%. Chip stocks rallied as investors bought shares in AI-related companies that are expected to drive a strong second-quarter earnings season. Liz Miller is founder and president of Summit Place Financial Advisors. “One of the things we're seeing in the market, post the real first trading day after second quarter, is the strength of oil retreating and risk-on back in this market. We're seeing strength across the AI trade. We're seeing money going back into tech, including some software that's been questionable through second quarter. So June often is considered not a strong month and ended up being a very strong month. And cash just continues to follow that strength.” Shares of Broadcom jumped more than 3.5% after the chipmaker said Apple agreed to extend a deal through 2031 to develop and supply a range of custom chips, cementing Broadcom's role as a critical supplier to the iPhone maker. :: SK Hynix Meanwhile, South Korean chipmaker SK Hynix on Monday launched a U.S. share sale to raise more than $28 billion in its effort to capitalize on massive investor demand for AI-related stocks. The company is set to debut on the Nasdaq later this week. :: Microsoft Elsewhere in the market, shares of Microsoft slipped after the tech heavyweight said it was cutting more than 2% of its workforce, or roughly 4,800 jobs. And shares of SpaceX dipped 1% with over $26 billion worth of its shares exchanged, most of that in the final seconds of the session. Elon Musk's rocket and AI giant is set to join the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 on Tuesday.

chineseTitle: 随着博通上涨，华尔街收高
chineseSummary: 故事：美国股市周一收高，道琼斯指数上涨近十分之三，标准普尔 500 指数上涨逾十分之七，纳斯达克指数上涨超过 1.2%。由于投资者购买了人工智能相关公司的股票，芯片股上涨，预计这些公司将推动第二季度财报季的强劲增长。莉兹·米勒 (Liz Miller) 是 Summit Place Financial Advisors 的创始人兼总裁。 “在第二季度后的第一个交易日后，我们在市场上看到的一件事是，石油价格回落和风险偏好在这个市场上回升。我们看到整个人工智能行业的强劲势头。我们看到资金回流到科技领域，包括一些在第二季度一直受到质疑的软件。因此，六月通常被认为不是一个强劲的月份，但最终却是一个非常强劲的月份。现金将继续追随这种强劲势头。”芯片制造商博通表示，苹果同意将开发和供应一系列定制芯片的协议延长至 2031 年，巩固了博通作为 iPhone 制造商关键供应商的地位，该公司股价上涨超过 3.5%。 :: SK Hynix 与此同时，韩国芯片制造商 SK Hynix 周一启动了美国股票发售，筹集超过 280 亿美元，以满足投资者对人工智能相关股票的巨大需求。该公司定于本周晚些时候在纳斯达克上市。 :: 微软 在市场的其他方面，科技巨头微软表示将裁员 2% 以上，即大约 4,800 个工作岗位后，该公司股价下跌。 SpaceX 股价下跌 1%，其股票交易价值超过 260 亿美元，其中大部分是在交易时段的最后几秒进行的。埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的火箭和人工智能巨头将于周二加入以科技股为主的纳斯达克 100 指数。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
